prompt: Tech-requirements.md exists for the self-hosted-application-platform capability at docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/tech-requirements.md. Plan the ADRs.

assertions.name: refuses_to_enumerate
assertions.check: Response declines to enumerate ADRs / decisions because the gate is not satisfied.

assertions.name: names_the_gate_state
assertions.check: Response specifically calls out the reviewed_at value (null or stale) as the reason for stopping.

assertions.name: instructs_user_to_set_reviewed_at
assertions.check: Response tells the user to set reviewed_at to today's ISO date in tech-requirements.md.

assertions.name: no_issues_filed
assertions.check: No `gh issue create` invocation occurs (no issues created).

assertions.name: no_decision_list_proposed
assertions.check: Response does not propose a list of ADRs / decisions.
